claims.falsification: schemas/telos-action-receipt-fixture-pass-0024.json is missing, has a different schema or status, reports different counts, has a different seal, or has a different chain head hash
claims.text: Pass 0024 created a TelosActionReceiptFixtureSet/v1 artifact with status ACTION_RECEIPT_FIXTURE_MATCH, four receipt events, nine negative fixtures, seal 58ed4ced91f18cbab776729f49f728d47013542cfc2448865bbdb8dccd1228e3, and chain_head_hash 0617602eed957e0bc6c2e4a21548528f6defc542c4468433bde85df76cb51b3a.

claims.falsification: the source_artifacts array is missing, omits any of the three pass 0023 source artifacts, or reports different SHA-256 digests
claims.text: Pass 0024 binds three upstream source artifacts: schemas/otel-recording-span-venv-pass-0023.json sha256 fc7beb76d616fd7823f0fe9a9cc879c92d00e5d7963a1e9228be89ae60486b1d, schemas/pass-0023-otel-recording-span-venv-validator-result.json sha256 cf08afa51e45e70c6f9b66f9b43f976400a3d004f71e392ebe43e78ae797eddc, and packets/033-otel-recording-span-venv.md sha256 945054a1aed15ecffcfd46427b97dd268056a05d08997906a99faab29eed5b05.

claims.falsification: upstream_span is missing, trace id or span id differs from pass 0023, exporter_sink_hash or fixture_hash differs, or receipt_is_trace_span is true
claims.text: Pass 0024 preserves pass 0023 OpenTelemetry continuity with trace_id_hex aaa76491660d7a56086f69d1be94debe, span_id_hex 1424d4ca9a6c5b58, exporter_sink_hash f2e9f33d12e261457731f6eedbe62c3c6d04d574c2c8274870da4eee0c2c2fc0, fixture_hash b1f3b6cd1c5b81d1784b29f5f9e11dd9ab1c2849f7510de94926dca07d5e2a25, receipt_is_trace_span=false, and links_to_action_receipt=true.

claims.falsification: the Telos contract excerpt is missing, has a different digest, or does not require digest references, append-only compensation, trace linking, receipt-is-not-span separation, proposed/completed separation, and export outside trace retention
claims.text: Pass 0024 includes a digest-bound project-telos.action-receipt/v1 contract excerpt with sha256 b2d08f56f2f8247c6661f81f25d5e84f916218ef132664f85365ce37a7ef5c5b and fields digest_references_required=true, append_only_compensation_required=true, receipt_is_trace_span=false, links_to_trace_span=true, proposed_completed_action_separation_required=true, and exportable_outside_trace_retention=true.

claims.falsification: the action chain omits any event, changes the order, changes the action identifiers, or changes the external_request_id
claims.text: Pass 0024 action_chain has action_id act_dogfood_0024_001, action_intent_id intent_dogfood_0024_001, idempotency_key idem_dogfood_0024_001, external_request_id local:dogfood-pass-0024-action-receipt-fixture, and ordered event types action_proposed, action_admitted, execution_completed, verification_recorded.

claims.falsification: any event hash differs, append_only is false, previous chain hashes do not link, write_hash is missing, or required action/policy/verification/material fields are absent
claims.text: Pass 0024 events are append-only and hash-bound with event hashes 2e48696173973a47b9dc6d7a15371b50a6d6121a942846ee609c3afae3fb2a8b, dfd5cbd9dfbec59ee45dff7b9622779b5ad5c094e709d457f4075e9af8be2fe6, 59121d18332e9171505259687e4f52d9a6eef576ad6b913093d34d208203e5e3, and e499b57cd42f808bd9859221914719737c8ea0111d918314df24d02803f938bf, while every event carries policy, verification, input material digests, trace span ref, and append-only persistence metadata.

claims.falsification: schemas/pass-0024-telos-action-receipt-fixture-validator-result.json is missing, reports non-MATCH status, does not report match=1, reports drift above zero, or reports a different event count, negative count, trace id, or span id
claims.text: Pass 0024 validator reports MATCH with match=1, drift=0, event_count=4, negative_fixture_count=9, receipt_is_trace_span=false, trace_id_hex aaa76491660d7a56086f69d1be94debe, and span_id_hex 1424d4ca9a6c5b58.

claims.falsification: negative_fixtures is missing, has fewer than nine rows, lacks REJECT expectations, or omits failure codes for trace collapse, missing material digest, missing verification, missing policy, proposed/completed collapse, non-append-only compensation, or unjoinable execution span
claims.text: Pass 0024 includes nine negative fixtures, all expected to REJECT, covering completed_action_collapsed_into_trace_span, missing_material_digest, verification_missing, policy_decision_unjoined, proposed_completed_action_collapsed, non_append_only_compensation, and unjoinable_execution_span.

claims.falsification: packet 034 or the adversarial steelman is missing, Gather does not verify packet 034, the packet SHA-256 or seal differs, or the packet/adversarial files promote live runtime integration, external write safety, scientific discovery, theorem proof, or a natural law
claims.text: Pass 0024 packet 034 was gathered and verified with SHA-256 2c5f373c9e7b3a70ad2e204060c159981a80c318d4ae22a1163f7d5b4cb47974 and digest seal e5f577d4667fb98aea9d6428c4c30a5663b6c96008331b145b14b6d5ef18968e, while packet 034 and the adversarial steelman preserve the non-promotion boundary.

claims.falsification: schemas/tool-receipts-pass-0024.json is missing, lacks required tool status receipts, treats Forum submit as successful, or omits the Telos action receipt and loop ledger receipts
claims.text: Pass 0024 records tool receipts showing Index, Gather, Telos, Forum status and ledger verify, and Crucible status as MATCH while preserving Forum submit as UNVERIFIABLE because no model executor is configured.

title: Dogfood Pass 0024 Telos Action Receipt Fixture
